title: CGM Eligibility Question — Acceptable Handling
scenario: Customer asks about CGM coverage. Agent gives accurate information but doesn't take initiative on next steps.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I wanted to see if I can get a continuous glucose monitor through my insurance.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Most insurances cover those if you're on insulin. Are you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Then you probably qualify. Your doctor will need to send us a prescription and a Certificate of Medical Necessity.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, what do I do next?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just have your doctor fax that paperwork to our intake team. Once we receive it we'll process your order.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Do you have the fax number?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Alright, I'll let my doctor know.
